Title: Search bar is visible on Products page
Steps: 1. Click 'Products' in header  2. Locate search input above the grid
Expected_Result: Search input and 'Search' button are visible on /products. Input has placeholder text.

Title: Valid search returns matching products
Steps: 1. Enter a term that matches existing products  2. Click 'Search'
Expected_Result: Results grid shows only products whose name or description matches 'tshirt'. Heading changes to 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS'.

Title: Search is case-insensitive
Expected_Result: Both searches return the same set of products in the same order.

Title: Partial-word search returns matches
Expected_Result: Products containing 'tshirt' (and any other partial match) are returned.

Title: Search with no results shows empty state
Steps: 1. Search for a string that matches nothing
Expected_Result: Page shows 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' heading but empty grid. No error. No infinite loader.
Notes: Verify behavior — actual AE behavior may differ

Title: Empty search returns full catalog
Expected_Result: Either: (a) page returns full catalog OR (b) form validation prevents submission. Document whichever applies — both are acceptable as long as no crash.

Title: Search with leading/trailing whitespace works
Steps: 1. Search with spaces around term  2. Compare to clean search
Expected_Result: Results match the trimmed version. Whitespace is ignored.

Title: Special characters in search do not break the page
Expected_Result: Page does not crash. No JS error in console. Either empty results or escaped query echoed in heading.

Title: Category sidebar filters products
Steps: 1. Click a category in left sidebar (e.g., 'Women')  2. Expand and click a subcategory (e.g., 'Dress')
Expected_Result: Grid shows only products from that category. Page URL/breadcrumb reflects the selection.

Title: Brand sidebar filters products
Steps: 1. Click a brand in left sidebar (e.g., 'Polo')
Expected_Result: Grid shows only products of that brand.

Title: Each result card has View Product link
Steps: 1. Hover over a result card  2. Click 'View Product'
Expected_Result: Product detail page opens for the correct product. URL contains the product id.

Title: Add-to-cart works from search results
Steps: 1. Hover over a result card  2. Click 'Add to cart' overlay
Expected_Result: Modal 'Added!' appears with 'Continue Shopping' and 'View Cart' options.
